storeDir.description: Directory for the Cortex store used by the OpenClaw plugin.

configPath.description: Path to the Cortex config.toml used by the managed MCP service.

transport.description: How the plugin talks to Cortex.

mcpCommand.description: Command used to launch the managed Cortex MCP server.

mcpArgs.description: Arguments passed to the managed Cortex MCP process.

defaultTarget.description: Default Cortex portability target used for live routed context.

smartRouting.description: Use Cortex smart routing so each runtime gets the right slice.

autoSeedThreads.description: Automatically materialize Cortex subject and thread scaffolds after turns.

projectDirStrategy.description: How the plugin resolves the project directory for Cortex calls.

projectDir.description: Explicit project directory when projectDirStrategy is explicit.

requestTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for Cortex MCP or bridge calls.

healthCheckTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for managed cortex-mcp health checks.

maxContextChars.description: Maximum routed Cortex context characters injected into each turn.

failOpen.description: If Cortex is unavailable, continue the turn without injected context.

externalBaseUrl.description: External Cortex base URL when transport is external-mcp.

identityFields.description: Controls which incoming fields the plugin uses when mapping users across channels.
